docs: Initializes the auction contract with controller, governance, and token contract reference.
constructors.label: new

docs: Emitted when the winning bid tokens are transferred out by the controller.
events.label: WinningBidTransferred

docs: Emitted when auction governance is transferred to a new account.
events.label: AuctionGovernanceUpdated

docs: Emitted when a bid is placed or raised on an auction.
events.label: BidPlaced

docs: Emitted when the admin account (allowed to bid on expired no-bid auctions) is updated.
events.label: AdminUpdated

docs: Emitted when a new liquidation auction is created.
events.label: AuctionCreated

docs: Emitted when a losing bidder withdraws their refund.
events.label: RefundWithdrawn

docs: Emitted when an auction is finalized, identifying the winning bidder.
events.label: AuctionFinalized

docs: Emitted whenever an owner sets or updates a spender's allowance.
events.label: Approval

docs: Emitted on token movement; `from = None` denotes a mint, `to = None` denotes a burn.
events.label: Transfer

docs: Creates a new liquidation auction for a vault with specified collateral and debt, returning the auction ID.
messages.label: create_auction

docs: Sets or clears the admin account that may bid on expired no-bid auctions; governance-only.
messages.label: set_admin

docs: Transfers auction governance to a new account; controller-only.
messages.label: update_governance

docs: Places a bid on an auction, transferring the bid amount and updating the highest bid if applicable.
messages.label: place_bid

docs: Finalizes an auction after it has ended, marking the highest bidder as winner.
messages.label: finalize_auction

docs: Transfers the winning bid out of the auction contract after finalization; only callable by the controller.
messages.label: transfer_winning_bid

docs: Withdraws refund for a losing bid after the auction is finalized.
messages.label: withdraw_refund

docs: Retrieves the details of an auction by its ID.
messages.label: get_auction

docs: Returns the active auction ID for a vault, or None if no active auction exists.
messages.label: get_active_vault_auction

docs: Retrieves a specific bid from an auction by auction ID and bid ID.
messages.label: get_bid

docs: Retrieves a specific bid from an auction by auction ID and Bidder.
messages.label: get_auction_bid

docs: Returns a paginated list of all bids placed on an auction.
messages.label: get_bids

docs: Returns the total number of auctions created.
messages.label: get_total_auctions_count

docs: Returns the total number of active auctions.
messages.label: get_active_auctions_count

docs: Returns a paginated list of all auctions.
messages.label: get_all_auctions

docs: Returns a paginated list of active auctions.
messages.label: get_active_auctions

docs: Returns the controller account ID.
messages.label: controller

docs: Returns the governance account ID.
messages.label: governance

docs: Returns the admin account ID.
messages.label: admin
